tech: PC Assembly, OS Installation, Software Setup, Hardware Diagnostics
title: Naogaon Tech. School ICT Lab
description: Set up the ICT computer lab at Naogaon Technical School & College. Responsible for PC assembly, operating system installation, educational software setup, and hardware diagnostics. The lab was used for SSC (Vocational) ICT classes, providing hands-on computer training to students.

images.title: Lab Setup
images.desc: Educational computer lab with modern furniture and equipment.

images.title: Computers
images.desc: Student workstations with educational software suite.

images.title: Classroom
images.desc: Classroom layout with smart board and projector setup.
